headline: Phillips 66 and Kinder Morgan Advance Western Gateway Pipeline Project Following Successful Open Season
summary: HOUSTON, April 20, 2026--Phillips 66 and Kinder Morgan, Inc. today announced the advancement of the Western Gateway Pipeline following a successful second open season.
